title: Davallia yaklaensis
taxonomy: Davallia yaklaensis is classified as a species of fern in the family Davalliaceae. This family consists of small to medium-sized ferns, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Davallia yaklaensis is further classified within the genus Davallia, which comprises about 50 to 60 species of ferns. The classification of Davallia yaklaensis is based on its physical characteristics, such as its leaf structure and growth habit. Davallia yaklaensis is a member of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns.
